{{Infobox group
| name = Architects
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

''See also: [[Architects Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Architects serve as the ruling council of the [[Consultant's Guild]]. Comprised of individuals with specialized talents such as [[alchemy]], strategy, administration, history, and [[Reading]], they are considered the most valuable members of the order because their skills are kept on [[Gray Island]] rather than being sent out into the world. While they function as a governing body, their authority is theoretically subject to the Mistress or Master of the Mists. The council operates with a high degree of anonymity; members often deliberate from shadowed alcoves to ensure they can voice opinions honestly without being identified. A smaller group known as the [[High Councilors]] represents the leadership tier. Visually, Architects are distinguished from other orders by their refined and expensive black clothing, which lacks the masks worn by [[Shepherds]] or [[Gardeners]]. They often carry specialized tools that signify their specific expertise, such as tweezers, chains, or scissors. Culturally, the Architects are known for being results-oriented and dedicated to their contracts, though they do not justify their actions to outsiders. They play a significant role in the political landscape, as their decisions regarding the rise of the [[Regents]] or the management of various [[Guilds]] can impact the stability and power of the [[Consultant's Guild]] and the broader [[Empire]].}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Architects]] do not allow [[Soulbound]] to keep their powers.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jarelys Teach]] is acquainted with two of the three currently ruling [[Architects]] in the [[Consultant]]’s [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Architects serve as the ruling council of the [[Consultant]]’s [[Guild]] and maintain authority over the [[Gray Island]], where they keep their students separate from other orders. This group of alchemically trained individuals includes those capable of [[Reading]], and they utilize their skills to create bait through a combination of [[alchemy]] and [[Reading]]. Within their domain, the Architects employ alchemists to breed [[spiders]], possess talented healers, and work on the construction of a box. Their decisions are often elevated to the status of [[Imperial]] mandates by [[Meia]], and they have been known to surround individuals like [[Shera]] and [[Meia]] at [[Bastion's Shadow]]. Under normal circumstances, certain subjects would have been inducted into this council, which meets in alcoves featuring stone benches built into the walls.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Architects]] are the ruling council of the [[Consultant]]’s [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] tends to elevate the will of the [[Architects]] to the level of an [[Imperial]] mandate.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Architects]] have alcoves with stone benches built into the wall.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] considers killing [[Architects]] to free [[Lucan]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Architects]] rule the [[Gray Island]] and their students are kept separate from other orders.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Architects]] are located on the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Architects]] are alchemically trained.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Architects]] have alchemists who are breeding [[spiders]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c9">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Architects]] create bait using a mix of [[Reading]] and [[alchemy]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A cluster of [[Architects]] surrounded [[Shera]] and [[Meia]] at [[Bastion's Shadow]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Architects]] are a group of people that include those who can [[Read]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c14">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Architects]] are making a box.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Under normal circumstances, the subject would have been inducted into the [[Architects]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Architects]] have talented healers.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Architects possess the authority to command [[Consultants]] to travel to the [[Capital]]. While [[Meia]] lacks any specific information from this group concerning [[Calder]], there is a possibility that the Architects could eventually be brought to his side. [[Meia]] notes that she would be required to report herself to them. Ultimately, [[Teach]] intends to force the Architects into a state of surrender.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Architects]] can order [[Consultants]] to the [[Capital]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c4">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Meia]] has no information from the [[Architects]] regarding [[Calder]] personally.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Architects]] might be brought to [[Calder]]'s side.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Meia]] mentions that she would have to report herself to the [[Architects]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Architects]] are a group that [[Teach]] intends to force into surrender.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Architects focus their efforts on designing intricate plans and calculating the approaching trajectory of [[Navigator ships]]. During a period of conflict, they receive advice to deploy alchemical charges against the quarters belonging to [[the Emperor]]. Furthermore, the group holds meetings regarding the confinement of [[Shera]] and serves as the collective responsible for determining her ultimate [[fate]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Architects]] design plans.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Architects]] are advised to use alchemical charges against the [[Emperor's quarters]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c15">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Architects]] are the group responsible for determining [[Shera]]'s [[fate]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c17">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Architects]] are responsible for meeting regarding [[Shera]]'s confinement.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Architects]] were calculating the approach of the [[Navigator ships]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Architects are an influential organization whose actions [[Lucan]] is currently investigating. This group possesses the authority to grant or deny permission for specific actions and maintains a hierarchy where [[Readers]] report directly to them. While the [[High Council]] consults with various members, including history specialists and [[Readers]], the Architects focus on planning strategies and acquiring tools. They believe certain [[alchemy]] is designed to immobilize powerful opponents, a capability demonstrated when they located an immobilized [[Zhen]]. Throughout their operations, the Architects express increasing excitement whenever a new individual successfully becomes [[Soulbound]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Architects]] believed the chosen [[alchemy]] was intended to restrain or immobilize powerful opponents.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Architects]] are a group whose actions [[Lucan]] is investigating.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Architects]] have the power to grant or deny permission for certain actions.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Zhen]] threatened to have the [[Architects]] knock [[Lucan]] back down to a recruit.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Architects]] have discussed options with [[Kerian]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Architects]] plan and look for strategies and tools.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[High Council]] consulted with other [[Architects]], primarily [[Readers]] and those trained in history.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c11">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Architects]] are an organization that can find [[Zhen]] immobilized.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c15">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Readers]] are found among the [[Architects]] at [[Shera]]'s meeting.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Architects]] are a group that [[Readers]] report to.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Architects]] grow more excited with every new person that comes out successfully [[Soulbound]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|“Your Architects have not ordered you to the Capital.”<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c4" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|"under normal circumstances they would have inducted him straight in the Architects."<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“We have some talented healers among the Architects,” Kerian said.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|"The Architects design the plans, the Masons lay the foundation, the Shepherds watch the flock, and Gardeners remove the weeds."<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
